CustomField.label: Object API Name
CustomField.description: The API name of the object this Check Set runs on. It must match the object of the record page where you place the component. Example: Account, Opportunity, or a custom object like SBQQ__Quote__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Type the object's API name, e.g. Account or Opportunity. It must match the record page exactly, or the component shows nothing.
